message:
test(fj-conformance): add 34 oracle tests for Conv and ReduceWindow

Adds conformance tests for two more JAX primitives:
- Conv: 16 tests for 1D/2D convolution (valid/same padding, strides, multi-channel)
- ReduceWindow: 18 tests for windowed reductions (sum/max/min pooling, 1D/2D)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
